name: Inner Mongolia TianShou Technology&development, CO., LTD.
summary: Inner Mongolia TianShou Technology&development, CO., LTD. manufactures and distributes textile products, testing instruments, caustic soda, and other products. It is also involved in the retailing business and related trading activities; and plant leasing business. The company was formerly known as The Inner Mongolia Sihai Technology Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Inner Mongolia TianShou Technology&development, CO., LTD. in June 2016. Inner Mongolia TianShou Technology&development, CO., LTD. is based in Beijing, China.
